description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that logs into a Docker registry using the before_script command `docker login -u \"$DOCKER_LOGIN\" -p \"$DOCKER_PASS\"`. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs in this stage, uses the runner tag `dockerarmhf`, and executes `docker build -t \"$DOCKER_IMAGE\" .` followed by `docker push \"$DOCKER_IMAGE\"`. After the job finishes, run an after_script that removes all local Docker images with `docker rmi --force $(docker images -q)`. The pipeline relies on the environment variables DOCKER_LOGIN, DOCKER_PASS and DOCKER_IMAGE and does not define any caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
